info.title: Dashboard Backend API
info.description: Dashboard Backend API with integrated Deployment Manager

x-user-id.description: Required when using Wallet Authentication. The public key used to sign authentication header.

authorization.description: Authentication token, either an API key or a wallet-signed message.

timeout.description: Timeout in minutes, must be at least 1 minute.
Timeout in minutes, must be at least 60 minute.

rotation_time.description: Rotation time in seconds. Must be at least 10 minutes less than timeout to allow for proper rotation.

type.description:
api        - we receive and send via an endpoint endpoint
api-listen - we create an endpoint to listen for incoming requests

args.description: Make all properties in T optional

parameters.description: Authorization header: Bearer <jwt> or Bearer <key>
parameters.name: authorization

assignedCredits.description: Total credits assigned to the user (USD)
Total credits assigned to the user (USD)
Total credits assigned to the user (USD)

get.summary: Get the current user's credit balance
get.description: Authentication required via Authorization header. Supports either JWT (Bearer <jwt>) or API key (Bearer <key>). Available balance is assignedCredits - reservedCredits - settledCredits.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Base64-encoded cursor for keyset pagination

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of items per page (10, 20, 50, or 100)

parameters.name: sort_order
parameters.description: Sort order: 'asc' (oldest first) or 'desc' (newest first)

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search for partial matches in deployment ID or name (case-insensitive)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Filter by exact deployment ID

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filter by exact deployment name

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by deployment status. Can be single value or comma-separated list

parameters.name: strategy
parameters.description: Filter by deployment strategy. Can be single value or comma-separated list

parameters.name: vault
parameters.description: Filter by vault public key

parameters.name: created_after
parameters.description: Filter deployments created after this date (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: created_before
parameters.description: Filter deployments created before this date (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: x-user-id
parameters.description: Required when using Wallet Authentication. The public key used to sign authentication header.

parameters.name: authorization
parameters.description: Authentication token, either an API key or a wallet-signed message.

parameters.name: x-nosana-api
parameters.description: Nosana API key

cursor_next.description: Cursor for next page, null if no more pages

cursor_prev.description: Cursor for previous page, null if on first page

total_items.description: Total number of items in collection

parameters.description: Base64-encoded cursor for keyset pagination

parameters.description: Number of items per page (10, 20, 50, or 100)

parameters.name: sort_order
parameters.description: Sort order: 'asc' (oldest first) or 'desc' (newest first)

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter by event category: 'Deployment' or 'Event'. Can be comma-separated list

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by event type. Can be single value or comma-separated list

parameters.name: created_after
parameters.description: Filter events created after this date (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: created_before
parameters.description: Filter events created before this date (ISO 8601 format)
